regimeSub: Risk-on reflation as the Iran war ends and oil deal floods supply, but 4.2% CPI keeps a politicized Fed boxed in.
themes: Iran ceasefire + US-sanctioned Iranian barrels return -> Brent sub-$80, energy-led inflation spike fades
Warsh's first FOMC with CPI at 3-yr high -> Fed credibility on trial, easing bias despite hot prints
Equities at records (SPX 7511, SpaceX IPO mania) -> froth and meme dynamics, complacent VIX at 16
Gold pinned near $4,350 -> hedge against negative real policy rates and Fed independence erosion

signalNotes.name: US Real Rate
signalNotes.note: Policy 3.63% vs CPI 4.2% = deeply negative real; even 10y at 4.47% barely positive real. Fed behind curve.

signalNotes.name: 2s10s Curve
signalNotes.note: +40bps and steepening; market prices cuts front-end despite sticky inflation, term premium building.

signalNotes.name: HY Credit Spread
signalNotes.note: Tight; risk-on de-escalation and record equities keep spreads compressed, no stress priced.

signalNotes.name: VIX
signalNotes.note: 16.4 — complacent. War-end relief rally crushed vol; cheap convexity into Warsh's debut FOMC.

signalNotes.name: Brent Crude
signalNotes.note: $78.75, broke below $80 on Iran barrels returning. Supply shock unwinding; disinflationary energy tailwind.

signalNotes.name: Gold
signalNotes.note: $4,353 — elevated despite risk-on. Hedges negative real rates and threats to Fed independence under Warsh/Trump.

signalNotes.name: USD / KRW
signalNotes.note: 1514 weak won despite KOSPI 8708 boom; DXY 99.5 soft. Tech-led flows vs dollar reflation crosscurrent.

signalNotes.name: Semiconductor SOX
signalNotes.note: KOSPI/Nikkei at records signal semis ripping; AI/tech leadership intact, risk appetite robust.

headline: The US-Israel war on Iran has ended with an oil deal that dumped Iranian barrels back to market, sending Brent below $80 and equities to records — but US inflation just hit a 3-year high of 4.2%, leaving Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting to manage reflation with a negative real policy rate and Washington breathing down its neck.
